title: Open Range Field Services ransomware incident

extortion.description: Open Range Field ServicesOpen Range Field Services, LLC was established in 2014 by Kent Dyson, James Kantola, and Ron Nelson. The company's headquarters is located in Pampa, TX. Open Range is a full-service surveying and mapping company specializing in the development and construction of energy-related infrastructure and assets. The organization's primary objective is to serve the energy and construction industry by providing responsive and innovative geospatial data solutions.Geo: USA - Leak size: 37 GB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
